title: Battlecard No. 003 — ClearCompany / ClearCo (off-watch-list)
summary: Third battlecard ships as a reference card, not a watch-list addition. ClearCompany rebranded to ClearCo on 2026-03-23 with AI- and agent-powered talent-platform positioning, but the agent framework is direction, not artifact — no MCP, no published bias audit, no AEDT page, no VPAT, no Responsible-AI page. Real mid-market base (~3,000 customers including ExxonMobil, JCPenney, Kawasaki), AI features listed without beta/GA labels or named LLMs. My recommendation: do not add to the permanent watch-list — their ICP barely overlaps ours and the AI cadence does not threaten our category narrative. Compass can carry as a one-page reference. Conditional on a real agent-framework spec landing later; if it does, I refresh.
